231.description: [Equipment] Permanently boost a monster's DEF by 500.

232.name: War Armor
232.description: [Equipment] Permanently boost a monster's ATK by 400 and DEF by 200.

233.name: Dragon Fang
233.description: [Equipment] Permanently boost a monster's ATK by 600.

234.name: Imperial Regalia
234.description: [Equipment] Permanently boost a monster's ATK by 500 and DEF by 300.

235.name: Mandate of Heaven's Edge
235.description: [Equipment] Permanently boost a monster's ATK by 600 and DEF by 400.

236.name: Sapling Token
236.description: A small sprout summoned to the field.

237.name: Bone Shard Token
237.description: A fragment of dragon bone animated by dark energy.

238.name: Ember Token
238.description: A flickering ember that burns with faint fire.

239.name: Mist Token
239.description: A wisp of mist given fleeting form.

240.name: Soldier Token
240.description: A humble foot soldier called to duty.

241.name: Abyssal River Dragon
241.description: A serpentine horror from the darkest depths, its presence erodes the enemy's will to fight.

242.name: Void Sea Emperor
242.description: Untouchable and absolute, this sovereign commands the tides to sweep away all opposition.

243.name: Primordial Ocean Sovereign
243.description: Born from the first waters of creation, its wrath brings ruin and revelation in equal measure.

244.name: Dark Torrent Serpent
244.description: Where it swims, currents reverse and enemies find themselves stranded without allies.

245.name: Abyssal Flood Dragon
245.description: When it rises, whole armies vanish beneath the waves, forgotten by time and tide.

246.name: River Phantom Champion
246.description: A spectral warrior whose touch chills the blood and sends foes fleeing to safer shores.

247.name: Shadow Tide Leviathan
247.description: From the abyss it comes, dragging enemies into darkness while their strength fades like memories.

248.name: Jade Water Dragon Empress
248.description: Elusive as morning mist, she sweeps the field clean with a gesture of imperial disdain.

249.name: Void Maelstrom Dragon
249.description: Chaos incarnate, it devours hope and returns enemies to whence they came, broken and alone.

250.name: Celestial Ocean Dragon King
250.description: Ruler of all waters, its command strips enemies bare and rewards the worthy with hidden truths.

251.name: Tidal Wave Bringer
251.description: Its coming heralds destruction - what it does not drown, it casts back in ruin.

252.name: Dark Current Overlord
252.description: Master of treacherous waters, it traps enemies in an endless cycle of loss.

253.name: Abyssal Void Serpent
253.description: Neither spell nor blade can anchor enemies against its reality-warping wrath.

254.name: Shadow River Tyrant
254.description: Cruel and patient, it extracts tribute of blood and cards before banishing the strong.

255.name: Deep Sea Phantom Emperor
255.description: Beyond the reach of blade or spell, it commands the battlefield from impossible depths.

256.name: Ancient Grove Guardian
256.description: Roots older than empires drain enemy strength and channel it into pure vitality.

257.name: Immortal World Tree
257.description: An eternal sentinel that cannot be felled, its branches rain blessing upon the worthy.

258.name: Celestial Grove Sovereign
258.description: Where it walks, forests bloom and enemies wither, for nature recognizes its true master.

259.name: Elder Forest Warden
259.description: Ancient bark and deeper wisdom - it saps enemy strength to nourish its allies.

260.name: Verdant Throne Guardian
260.description: Protector of the green realm, it strengthens allies while choking foes in endless vines.

261.name: Forest Sage Elder
261.description: Centuries of wisdom distilled into bark and leaf, healing allies while hindering foes.

262.name: Corrupted Nature Spirit
262.description: Once pure, now twisted - it drains vitality from enemies to sustain its cursed existence.

263.name: Sacred Garden Emperor
263.description: In the emperor's garden, all enemies kneel as their strength becomes his sustenance.

264.name: Eternal Bloom Spirit
264.description: Even in death, its essence spreads like pollen, bringing renewal from destruction.

265.name: Divine Celestial Orchard
265.description: A living paradise that rewards the patient and punishes the ambitious with sweet, slow decay.

266.name: Thornwood Sage
266.description: Ancient wisdom wrapped in thorns - it teaches enemies humility through pain and loss.

267.name: Ancient Vine Emperor
267.description: Its roots drink deep from enemy weakness, spreading strength and knowledge to allies.

268.name: Nature's Indestructible Warden
268.description: Neither blade nor flame can fell what has stood since the world began.

269.name: Blossom Immortal Sage
269.description: From each defeat, it draws wisdom and shares strength, teaching that death brings rebirth.

270.name: Celestial Canopy Sovereign
270.description: Under its branches, allies flourish while enemies find their efforts bearing no fruit.

271.name: Adamantine Stone Guardian
271.description: An immovable monument that turns enemy strength against itself with implacable patience.

272.name: Monolith of the Eternal Plain
272.description: Silent and eternal, it stands resolute while attackers break themselves against its presence.

273.name: Celestial Mountain Emperor
273.description: Beyond reach and beyond destruction, it embodies the eternal strength of stone.

274.name: Buried Terra Guardian
274.description: Hidden beneath the earth, it strikes when enemies least expect, rising like judgment.

275.name: Jade Pillar Sentinel
275.description: A defensive masterpiece that turns assaults into opportunities for fortification.

276.name: Stone Wall Guardian
276.description: Patient as sediment, it absorbs punishment while its presence bleeds enemy resolve.

277.name: Mountain Fortress Golem
277.description: Each blow against it strengthens the mountain's resolve and builds stronger defenses.

278.name: Ancient Terra General
278.description: When it reveals itself, enemies fall and fortifications rise in the same heartbeat.

279.name: Indestructible Cliff Warden
279.description: The cliff endures, and so rewards those who strike true with hidden treasurts.

280.name: Heavenly Pillar Emperor
280.description: A monument that cannot fall, turning every battle into a lesson in futility.

281.name: Hidden Earth Guardian
281.description: The ground itself protects allies, revealing its fury only when the unwary strike.

282.name: Magma Stone Revenant
282.description: Volcanic fury given form - its wounds bleed fire and its rage burns twice as hot.

283.name: Untargetable Mountain King
283.description: Kings cannot be touched by common hands, and this one commands stone to judgment.

284.name: Buried Treasure Guardian
284.description: It protects ancient wealth by destroying both attackers and their arcane tools.

285.name: Eternal Fortress Emperor
285.description: An unmoving sovereign whose very presence denies enemies their next chance.

286.name: Celestial Forge Dragon
286.description: Born of divine fire and tempered steel, it sharpens allies for the coming battle.

287.name: Adamantine War Sovereign
287.description: The pinnacle of martial perfection, granting strength beyond mortal limits.

288.name: Starforged Metal Emperor
288.description: Forged in dying stars, it strikes directly at enemies while empowering allies to godhood.

289.name: Golden Forge General
289.description: Master craftsmen forged this champion to lead and strengthen those who follow.

290.name: Radiant Metal Sovereign
290.description: Its gleaming presence inspires all metal warriors to greater heights of martial prowess.

291.name: Tempered Steel Champion
291.description: Tested in a thousand battles, it grants allies the piercing edge needed to find victory.

292.name: Dark Metal Warlord
292.description: Cursed steel that grants power at the cost of balance between offense and defense.

293.name: Cursed Blade Sovereign
293.description: The blade thirsts for blood - ally strength rises while enemy life force drains away.

294.name: Divine Forge Emperor
294.description: Every weapon forged under its blessing carries a spark of divine purpose.

295.name: Celestial Armament God
295.description: A deity of war that bypasses defenses while elevating mortal arms to legendary status.

296.name: Iron Bulwark Champion
296.description: Defense perfected into art, granting allies the endurance to weather any storm.

297.name: Starforged Vanguard
297.description: Struck from celestial metal, it balances perfectly between protection and devastation.

298.name: Infernal Metal Sovereign
298.description: Hellfire tempers its gifts - strength for allies and destruction for the weak.

299.name: Void Metal Reaver
299.description: Slipping between realities, it strikes where enemies cannot defend while arming allies.

300.name: Eternal Forge Dragon King
300.description: The furnace never cools, and allies find endless strength flowing from its immortal flames.

301.name: Volcanic Apocalypse Dragon
301.description: Its arrival heralds burning rain and the end of all who dare stand against it.

302.name: World Ender Phoenix
302.description: Sacrifice fuels its rebirth, and from the ashes rises a conflagration that consumes all.

303.name: Infernal Calamity Sovereign
303.description: Fire given crown and kingdom - it burns the slate clean for a new dawn.

304.name: Magma Storm General
304.description: From the volcano's heart it comes, destroying the weak while paving paths to victory.

305.name: Perish Flame Emperor
305.description: Even in destruction, it refuses to die quietly, taking enemies with it into oblivion.

306.name: Blazing Onslaught Commander
306.description: Fire and steel combined, burning through opposition with tactical brilliance.

307.name: Crimson Tide Warlord
307.description: Wreathed in healing flames, it proves that destruction and renewal are one.

308.name: Immolation Overlord
308.description: It embraces death to unleash final devastation upon all who witness its passing.

309.name: Hellfire Invasion Dragon
309.description: The gates of the burning realm open, and legions fall before its advance.

310.name: Eternal Inferno Sovereign
310.description: From the grave it reaches, ensuring its fire claims enemies even in death.

311.name: Scorched Earth Marshal
311.description: Methodical destruction - it identifies weakness and burns it to ash.

312.name: Flame Wraith Warlord
312.description: Death only fuels its vengeance, drawing power from destruction to continue the battle.

313.name: Blazing Cataclysm Dragon
313.description: Fire, ruin, and chaos intertwine in its devastating arrival.

314.name: Volcanic Storm Sovereign
314.description: It rains fire and denies enemies any respite or recovery.

315.name: Infernal Devastation Dragon
315.description: Power paid in blood unleashes armageddon upon the battlefield.

316.name: Storm Dragon of the Abyss
316.description: Thunder and shadow merge in a predator that strikes from nowhere.

317.name: Void Thunder Dragon Emperor
317.description: Beyond mortal influence, it descends like a storm, devastating all below.

318.name: Primordial Thunder Dragon God
318.description: The first storm given form, untouchable and absolute in its divine wrath.

319.name: Stormscale Dragon Overlord
319.description: Lightning runs through its scales, empowering its kin with electric fury.

320.name: Heavenly Storm Dragon King
320.description: Master of wind and lightning, it calls fallen kin back to fight again.

321.name: Dusk Thunder Drake
321.description: A predator of twilight hours, announcing its presence with devastating thunder.

322.name: Storm Drake Commander
322.description: Where it flies, storms follow, blessing dragonkind with electric strength.

323.name: Celestial Thunder Sovereign
323.description: Divine lightning given form - no force of man or magic can halt its judgment.

324.name: Lightning Storm Dragon
324.description: Faster than sight, it strikes where enemies least expect and rewards those who watch.

325.name: Divine Storm Dragon Emperor
325.description: The storm's apex predator, existing beyond mortal limits, dealing divine punishment.

326.name: Thunder Drake Warlord
326.description: It calls allies from hand to field while thunder heralds its approach.

327.name: Storm Legion Dragon
327.description: It commands the dead and the living alike, binding them in storm and fury.

328.name: Thunder Dragon Necromancer
328.description: Beyond magical interference, it raises the fallen while unleashing electric destruction.

329.name: Storm Conquest Dragon
329.description: Victory through overwhelming force, it strengthens dragons while eliminating the weak.

330.name: Lightning Dragon Overlord
330.description: Direct and devastating, it strikes where it wills while calling allies to battle.

331.name: Undying Phoenix Sage
331.description: Death is merely transition - what falls rises again, bringing allies from beyond.

332.name: Immortal Phoenix Emperor
332.description: A sovereign of eternal flame that cannot be destroyed, commanding life and death.

333.name: Eternal Cycle Phoenix God
333.description: The cosmic cycle made manifest - death, rebirth, and endless renewal.

334.name: Reborn Phoenix Sage
334.description: Each death teaches wisdom, and from destruction comes unexpected allies.

335.name: Phoenix of the Endless Dawn
335.description: Every ending is a new beginning, and from the ashes rises fresh hope.

336.name: Cinder Phoenix Warden
336.description: Guardian of the sacred flames, it finds strength even in destruction.

337.name: Ash Phoenix Sovereign
337.description: Master of the grave and sky, it returns fallen allies to the fight.

338.name: Vengeful Phoenix Overlord
338.description: Wrath burns eternal - death only intensifies its fiery vengeance.

339.name: Gravebinding Phoenix
339.description: It binds past and present, returning what was lost and drawing wisdom from destruction.

340.name: Immortal Vermillion God
340.description: The southern constellation's avatar - undying, radiant, and eternally balanced.

341.name: Eternal Flame Phoenix
341.description: Fire that never truly dies, finding opportunity in each apparent end.

342.name: Dusk Phoenix Necromancer
342.description: Twilight's guardian commands both the fallen and the fates of enemies.

343.name: Divine Phoenix Sage
343.description: Beyond the reach of mortal magic, it reshapes destruction into renewal.

344.name: Radiant Phoenix Immortal
344.description: Each fall grants greater wisdom, healing allies and drawing strength from sacrifice.

345.name: Phoenix of the Crimson Dawn
345.description: Blood-red fire heralds its coming - rebirth, vengeance, and revelation intertwined.

346.name: Iron Cavalry Dragon General
346.description: Master strategist commanding endless legions, turning battles into overwhelming victories.

347.name: Heavenly Vanguard Emperor
347.description: The perfect commander - inspiring troops, calling reinforcements, and leading from the front.

348.name: Divine War God
348.description: A deity of battle, granting strength and numbers beyond mortal comprehension.

349.name: Grand Battalion General
349.description: It speaks, and warriors appear, strengthened by the call to arms.

350.name: Lightning War Champion
350.description: Too fast to block, it empowers allies while striking where enemies cannot defend.

351.name: Rally Commander
351.description: Where others see defeat, it sees opportunity - calling fresh troops to the field.

352.name: Battle Formation Master
352.description: Perfect positioning and timing, turning allies into an unstoppable force.

353.name: Conqueror's War Banner
353.description: The banner rises, armies swell, and enemies burn under its inspiring presence.

354.name: Strategic War Council
354.description: Wisdom and numbers combined - every battle plan includes reinforcements.

355.name: Mandate of War God
355.description: Divine right to rule the battlefield - strength, numbers, and knowledge flow from its presence.

356.name: Vanguard Assault Leader
356.description: Leading from the front, it prepares allies for the perfect strike.

357.name: Iron Legion Commander
357.description: Tactical genius - reinforcing allies while drawing fresh recruits.

358.name: Piercing War Overlord
358.description: No defense can stand against its warriors, and no enemy goes unanswered.

359.name: Divine Legion General
359.description: Blessed command - where it points, allies appear in overwhelming numbers.

360.name: War Sovereign of the Central Plains
360.description: Ultimate authority - commanding legions, devastating enemies, claiming victory.

361.name: Thunderstorm Overlord
361.description: Dark clouds gather at its command, and enemies are struck numb with fear.

362.name: Celestial Storm Emperor
362.description: Heaven's wrath made manifest - thunder, ruin, and absolute silence follow.

363.name: Lightning Calamity God
363.description: A deity of sudden destruction, claiming victory through overwhelming power.

364.name: Storm Disruption Dragon
364.description: Where it flies, enemies lose their grip on weapons and hope alike.

365.name: Tempest Disaster Sovereign
365.description: The storm's master delivers devastation and denies enemies any recovery.

366.name: Shockwave Commander
366.description: Its presence announces destruction - swift, sure, and merciless.

367.name: Storm Tyrant
367.description: A cruel master of storms that leaves enemies broken and waiting for mercy that never comes.

368.name: Thunder God's Wrath
368.description: Divine judgment falls like lightning - burning, breaking, and burying all below.

369.name: Lightning Disintegration Dragon
369.description: It burns what cannot be killed, silences what cannot be stopped, and ends all resistance.

370.name: Divine Storm God
370.description: The skies themselves obey - no enemy draws breath without permission.

371.name: Bolt Strike Champion
371.description: Swift as lightning and twice as devastating, it claims tribute in blood and cards.

372.name: Thunder Disruption Warden
372.description: Keeper of the storm's edge, it disrupts and destroys in measured fury.

373.name: Storm Salvage Overlord
373.description: From chaos, it plucks victory - denying enemies while reclaiming what was lost.

374.name: Lightning Siphon Dragon
374.description: It drinks the storm's power and feeds on enemy despair.

375.name: Tempest Annihilation Sovereign
375.description: Complete destruction - flesh, steel, and spell all swept away by the tempest.

376.name: Infernal Dragon Champion
376.description: A fusion of draconic fury that leaves nothing standing in its wake.

377.name: Void Storm Dragon
377.description: Born from darkness and lightning, it strikes where enemies cannot defend.

378.name: Adamantine War Dragon
378.description: Steel and scale merge into the ultimate weapon of conquest.

379.name: Divine War Dragon Emperor
379.description: Military perfection given draconic form - commanding, strengthening, conquering.

380.name: Infernal Phoenix Drake
380.description: Fire and rebirth intertwined, bringing destruction even in death.

381.name: Cataclysm Phoenix Dragon
381.description: The apocalypse given wings - immortal, devastating, eternal.

382.name: Storm Tide Dragon
382.description: Where lightning meets the sea, enemies drown and burn simultaneously.

383.name: Tempest Ocean Dragon Emperor
383.description: Master of storm and wave, it sweeps opposition into oblivion.

384.name: Void River Dragon King
384.description: Dark waters and darker fate - enemies vanish beneath its command.

385.name: Eternal River Dragon Sovereign
385.description: The endless flow carries enemies away, weakened and forgotten.

386.name: Fortress Stone Golem
386.description: Earth and steel merged into an immovable monument of war.

387.name: Citadel of Eternal Stone
387.description: A walking fortress that breaks all who dare strike against it.

388.name: Hellfire Inferno Dragon
388.description: Fire and dragon-kind combine to rain devastation upon all opposition.

389.name: Infernal Dragon Calamity
389.description: A disaster given form - burning through all resistance with hellish precision.

390.name: Divine Phoenix Dragon
390.description: Immortal light and draconic power merge into eternal vengeance.

391.name: Celestial Phoenix Dragon God
391.description: Beyond mortality, beyond magic - a god of rebirth and burning judgment.

392.name: Primordial Void Dragon Emperor
392.description: The ultimate fusion - untouchable, undestroyable, absolutely devastating.

393.name: Immortal Phoenix Dragon God
393.description: Death has no claim on this divine destroyer of worlds.

394.name: Apocalypse Thunder Dragon God
394.description: The end times made flesh - where it strikes, nothing remains.

395.name: Hand Devastation
395.description: Enemy plans crumble as their resources vanish into the void.

396.name: Grave Banishment
396.description: The graveyard holds no secrets and offers no comfort to the fallen.

397.name: Flame Cataclysm
397.description: A tide of fire that consumes all opposition while burning the enemy's resolve.

398.name: Mind Shatter
398.description: Enemies lose not only their cards but their next chance at redemption.

399.name: Divine Healing
399.description: Heaven's blessing restores vitality to those who fight for righteousness.

400.name: Nature's Corruption
400.description: The natural order turns against enemies, sapping strength while restoring allies.

401.name: Sacrificial Arrow
401.description: A price in blood unlocks devastating destruction and hidden knowledge.

402.name: Divine Forge
402.description: Holy fire tempers weapons into instruments of unprecedented might.

403.name: Masterwork Armament
403.description: Legendary craftsmanship forges weapons of perfect balance and power.

404.name: Celestial Arsenal
404.description: Divine armaments granted to the worthy, alongside the wisdom to wield them.

405.name: War Drums
405.description: The drums of war thunder, inspiring all warriors to greater feats.

406.name: Iron Legion March
406.description: The legion advances, never stopping, always strengthening.

407.name: Divine Legion Banner
407.description: The sacred banner rises, and allies appear in numbers beyond counting.

408.name: Grave Resurrection
408.description: The dead rise again, answering the call to fight once more.

409.name: Eternal Cycle
409.description: The grave feeds the deck, and the deck feeds new hope.

410.name: Phoenix Rebirth Ritual
410.description: Death becomes life, and endings become new beginnings.

411.name: Flame Strike
411.description: Pure fire descds from the heavens, searing enemy flesh and resolve.

412.name: Thundering Bolt
412.description: Lightning arcs across the battlefield, burning and disrupting in equal measure.

413.name: Lightning Judgment
413.description: Divine verdict delivered in thunder and flame, with no appeal possible.

414.name: Soul Taking
414.description: The enemy's champion becomes yours - a permanent reminder of their defeat.

415.name: Divine Conquest
415.description: Blood payment for absolute domination - their warrior becomes your weapon.

416.name: Ancient Wisdom
416.description: Forbidden knowledge flows from ancient texts into waiting hands.

417.name: Strategic Genius
417.description: Sacrifice a little to gain much - the mark of a true tactician.

418.name: War Wisdom
418.description: Knowledge of battle brings both cards and devastation to enemies.

419.name: Monster Recruitment
419.description: The call goes forth, and worthy champions answer from across the realm.

420.name: Fate's Choice
420.description: Power claimed at a price - any card, any stratagem, made real.

421.name: Divine Mandate
421.description: Heaven decrees your victory and provides the means to achieve it.

422.name: Spell Storm
422.description: Enemy magic scatters like leaves before the divine tempest.

423.name: Cataclysmic Cleansing
423.description: Fire purifies all - spells, traps, and the weak alike.

424.name: Mind Crush
424.description: Enemy thoughts scatter, weakened by the assault on their very mind.

425.name: Thought Erasure
425.description: Deep erosion of enemy plans, resources, and hope.

426.name: Mind Annihilation
426.description: Total mental collapse - resources destroyed, next opportunity denied.

427.name: Grave Storm
427.description: Enemy resources pour into the graveyard like leaves in autumn wind.

428.name: Grave Cataclysm
428.description: Wholesale destruction of enemy potential, with compensation for the effort.

429.name: Battle Fury
429.description: Warrior's spirit ignites, granting strength beyond normal limits.

430.name: Divine Fury
430.description: Heaven's wrath empowers allies while revealing hidden knowledge.

431.name: Iron Bulwark
431.description: An impenetrable defense that grows stronger with each test.

432.name: Divine Shield
432.description: Enemy blows become their own undoing, turned back with interest.

433.name: Sacrificial Fire
433.description: The final offering - all falls to ash, and enemies burn in the aftermath.

434.name: Armageddon
434.description: The end of all things - total destruction, total victory, absolute dominion.

435.name: Ambush Annihilation
435.description: Enemies walk into death unaware, their plans shattered in a single moment.

436.name: Thunder Trap
436.description: Lightning strikes the unwary, killing and burning in the same heartbeat.

437.name: Reflective Mirror
437.description: Enemy force reflected back doubled, with new insight as reward.

438.name: Tidal Ambush
438.description: Enemies find themselves swept away, empty-handed and defeated.

439.name: Void Negation
439.description: Attack denied, enemy banished, insight gained - total reversal.

440.name: Flame Trap
440.description: Fire erupts from concealment, destroying attackers and burning their master.

441.name: Mass Removal Trap
441.description: When enemies mass, they become targets - every single one eliminated.

442.name: Tactical Retreat
442.description: A moment's pause brings fresh perspective and new opportunities.

443.name: Counter Strike
443.description: Defense becomes offense in an instant, with devastating results.

444.name: Annihilation Trap
444.description: Complete reversal - attack stopped, attacker destroyed, insight revealed.

445.name: Hand Destruction Trap
445.description: Fresh troops fall, but enemy resources fall faster.

446.name: Total Disruption
446.description: Enemy momentum dies, resources scatter, next chance vanishes.

447.name: Double Reflect
447.description: The harder they strike, the more they suffer.

448.name: Triple Reflect
448.description: Enemy aggression becomes their undoing threefold.

449.name: Quadruple Reflect
449.description: Unimaginable consequences for those who dare attack.

450.name: Spell Negation
450.description: Enemy magic unravels, and their tools become targets.

451.name: Mass Negation
451.description: Complete denial of enemy sorcery, with extra payment extracted.

452.name: Divine Negation
452.description: Heaven rejects enemy magic, destroying their forces in divine wrath.

453.name: Draw Disruption
453.description: Even hope is denied - new cards become new losses.

454.name: Total Draw Denial
454.description: Complete suppression of enemy opportunity and resources.

455.name: Defensive Counter
455.description: Perfect defense with fatal consequences for the attacker.

456.name: Vengeful Counter
456.description: Attackers die, their master burns, and their effort becomes their end.

1.name: Pang Tong
1.title: The Mentor
1.flavor: A wise advisor at the imperial court.

3.name: Zhao Yun
3.title: The Brave General
3.flavor: A loyal general with unwavering honor.

4.name: Villager
4.title: Simple Farmer
4.flavor: A villager who must defend himself.

5.name: Villager
5.title: Wandering Merchant
5.flavor: A traveling merchant with a few cards.

6.name: Villager
6.title: Village Elder
6.flavor: The most experienced duelist in the village.

7.name: Cao Pi
7.title: The Hero's Rival
7.flavor: The ambitious son of the Wei clan.

8.name: Zhang Jue
8.title: Master of the Yellow Sky
8.flavor: The leader of the Yellow Turbans. His sorcery is overwhelming.

9.name: Tang Long
9.title: The Tiger
9.flavor: His deck is as fierce as a tiger on the hunt.

10.name: Hua Min
10.title: Mistress of Metamorphosis
10.flavor: Her creatures transform before your eyes.

11.name: Feng Hua
11.title: Dance of the Fenghuang
11.flavor: Born from ashes, indestructible and beautiful.

13.name: Dao Ren
13.title: Master of Trigrams
13.flavor: The eight symbols reveal the future to him.

14.name: Bai Chen
14.title: Lord of the Jiangshi
14.flavor: His undead servants know neither fatigue nor mercy.

15.name: Maximilian Crest
15.title: The Last Samurai
15.flavor: A master swordsman from a forgotten era.

18.name: Huang Bing
18.title: Yellow Turban Foot Soldier
18.flavor: The first enemy after returning to the past.

19.name: Zhao Yun
19.title: The Brave General (2nd Duel)
19.flavor: The general challenges you once more.

20.name: Sun Shangxiang
20.title: Warrior Princess (2nd Duel)
20.flavor: The princess reveals her true strength.

21.name: Zhan Liu
21.title: Apprentice of the Water Shrine
21.flavor: His damp current is only the beginning.

23.name: Qing Miao
23.title: Apprentice of the Wood Shrine
23.flavor: A green sprout that becomes a tree.

27.name: Duan Ren
27.title: Apprentice of the Metal Shrine
27.flavor: The forged blade seeks its target.

30.name: Chi Yan
30.title: Master of the Fire Shrine
30.flavor: The red flame knows no mercy.

31.name: Mi Hun
31.title: The Misleading Soul
31.flavor: Neither human nor spirit — the labyrinth itself.

32.name: Cao Pi
32.title: The Hero's Rival (2nd Duel)
32.flavor: The traitor reveals his true face.

34.name: Ye Lang
34.title: The Night Wolf
34.flavor: Aggressive from the very first turn.

35.name: Zhang Jue
35.title: Master of the Yellow Sky (2nd Duel)

36.name: Cao Pi
36.title: Forced Alliance
36.flavor: A fragile alliance against a greater threat.

37.name: Lu Bu
37.title: The Invincible Warrior
37.flavor: Unleashed by Zhang Jue — pure destruction.

39.name: Cao Cao
39.title: The Man Behind It All
39.flavor: Duel Master C — the true master.

tier_5_temple.name: Temple Relics
tier_5_temple.desc: 9 Cards · Elite · Max 3000 ATK · No Ultra Rare

campaign.story_intro_1: The Han Dynasty crumbles. Warlords carve the empire into warring kingdoms, and the people suffer under endless war.
campaign.story_intro_2: Yet amidst the chaos, a different kind of battle has emerged — one fought not with swords, but with cards of power.
campaign.story_intro_3: Oh, a new face at the imperial court! I am Pang Tong. Tell me — do you know the way of duel cards?
campaign.story_intro_4: Each card holds the spirit of a warrior, a beast, or a spell. Master them, and you master the battlefield itself.
campaign.story_intro_5: Take this starter deck. Prove your worth against the court's duelists, and perhaps you will earn a place in the grand tournament.
campaign.duel_7_post_1: Impressive. You actually managed to defeat me. Don't let it go to your head — I wasn't even trying.
campaign.duel_7_post_2: But mark my words: the next time we meet, I will crush you without mercy. The Wei clan does not lose twice.
campaign.duel_7_post_3: Cao Pi left with a cold smile. His ambition was unmistakable — this rivalry was far from over.
campaign.duel_8_post_1: The Yellow Sky watches over all. You fought well, child, yet the heavens cannot be moved by mortal strength alone.
campaign.duel_8_post_2: Zhang Jue's sorcery proved too powerful. The cards scattered like leaves in a storm.
campaign.duel_8_post_3: A blinding light engulfed the arena. When it faded, the world around you had... changed.
campaign.duel_8_post_4: The imperial court was gone. In its place stood an unknown land — the past, or perhaps something even stranger.
campaign.story_arrival_1: After days of wandering, you reached a great walled city. Banners of every color hung from its towers.
campaign.story_arrival_2: This was the legendary Tournament of the Three Kingdoms — where the greatest duelists from all lands gathered.
campaign.story_arrival_3: The prize: a set of cards said to hold the power of the ancient Five Elements.
campaign.story_arrival_4: To claim them, you would need to fight through qualifiers, quarterfinals, semifinals, and a grand finale.
campaign.story_arrival_5: You entered your name and stepped into the arena. The crowd roared. The tournament had begun.
campaign.duel_17_post_1: The final card hit the field, and the crowd erupted in cheers. Against all odds, you had won the tournament.
campaign.duel_17_post_2: The Five Elements cards were yours. Yet as you held them, a strange energy pulsed through your fingertips.
campaign.duel_17_post_3: Something awakened — something ancient and powerful. The cards seemed to call you to a distant place.
campaign.story_return_1: Guided by the pull of the Five Elements cards, you traveled deep into the wilderness beyond the city walls.
campaign.story_return_2: Familiar faces appeared along the way — old rivals seeking a rematch, and new enemies drawn by your growing fame.
campaign.story_return_3: The cards pulsed stronger with each step. Whatever lay ahead — there was no turning back.
campaign.story_return_4: At last, you stood before a massive stone gate, adorned with the symbols of Water, Wood, Earth, Metal, and Fire.
campaign.duel_31_pre_1: You dare enter my domain? I am Mi Hun — I am the labyrinth, and the labyrinth is me.
campaign.duel_31_pre_2: Every soul that wanders these halls feeds my power. Your Five Elements cards summoned you here — but they will not save you.
campaign.duel_31_pre_3: Then come, mortal. Let us see if your cards can unravel what your mind cannot.
campaign.duel_31_post_1: The labyrinth trembled and began to collapse. Mi Hun's form dissolved into mist, with one final, echoing whisper.
campaign.duel_31_post_2: As the walls crumbled, a hidden passage was revealed — deeper underground, toward a faint, ominous glow.
campaign.story_betrayal_1: You stepped out of the labyrinth into daylight, only to see a familiar figure waiting at the exit.
campaign.story_betrayal_2: Surprised? You shouldn't be. I've been tracking your progress since the tournament. Those Five Elements cards — I need them.
campaign.story_betrayal_3: My father demands power, and I will bring it to him. Hand over the cards, or I will take them by force.
campaign.story_betrayal_4: Did you really believe we were rivals? No — you were just a pawn, sent to gather what I could not reach alone.
campaign.story_betrayal_5: Cao Pi drew his deck. There would be no negotiation. Only battle.
campaign.duel_32_post_1: Cao Pi stumbled back, his cards scattered across the ground. Defeat was written on his face.
campaign.duel_32_post_2: This... this changes nothing. My father will still get what he wants. You have no idea what's coming for you.
campaign.duel_32_post_3: He vanished into the shadows. His words lingered — who was the true enemy pulling the strings from behind?
campaign.duel_35_post_1: Zhang Jue sank to his knees, his mystical aura flickering and fading like a dying flame.
campaign.duel_35_post_2: You have grown strong... yet I was never the true threat. The one who summoned me — he still lurks in the shadows.
campaign.duel_35_post_3: Before you could question him further, a dark portal tore open behind the fallen sorcerer. Something immense stirred within.
campaign.story_alliance_1: To your surprise, Cao Pi appeared at the edge of the battlefield — not as an enemy, but with an outstretched hand.
campaign.story_alliance_2: I know what you're thinking. But my father has gone too far. He plans to unleash Lu Bu — the war demon himself.
campaign.story_alliance_3: Neither of us can stop him alone. For now — let us join forces. When this is over... we shall see.
campaign.story_alliance_4: An uneasy alliance was forged. Together, you pressed forward into the heart of the gathering storm.
campaign.duel_37_post_1: Lu Bu let out a thunderous roar as he fell. Yet the ground beneath you began to shake violently.
campaign.duel_37_post_2: The warrior's body erupted in crimson light. When it faded, Lu Bu stood once more — riding the legendary Red Hare.
campaign.duel_38_post_1: At last, Lu Bu collapsed for good. The Red Hare dissolved into embers carried away by the wind.
campaign.duel_38_post_2: Yet from the shadows behind the fallen warrior, a slow, deliberate clapping echoed across the battlefield.
campaign.duel_38_post_3: Well played, both of you. But every piece on this board moved exactly as I intended. Now — let me show you the deck of a true master.
campaign.duel_39_post_1: Cao Cao's final card shattered. The mastermind stared in disbelief at his empty hand, then began to laugh.
campaign.duel_39_post_2: The Five Elements cards blazed with brilliant light, and the dark energy that had torn the world apart began to recede.
campaign.duel_39_post_3: The sky cleared. The land healed. The echoes of the Three Kingdoms faded into gentle silence.
campaign.duel_39_post_4: Your journey was over — yet the cards remained, humming softly, as if waiting for the next great duelist.
